nodes.name: Chestnut-backed sparrow-weaver
nodes.summary: Chestnut-backed sparrow-weaver（Plocepasser rufoscapulatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Chestnut-backed sparrow-weaver。

nodes.name: Plocepasser
nodes.summary: Plocepasser（Plocepasser）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如White-browed sparrow-weaver、Donaldson Smith's sparrow-weaver、Chestnut-crowned sparrow-weaver等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Chestnut-backed sparrow-weaver
nodes.summary: The chestnut-backed sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser rufoscapulatus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in southern Africa from Angola and southern Democratic Republic of Congo to Zambia and Malawi. References External links Chestnut-mantled Sparrow-Weaver, or Chestnut-backed Sparrow-Weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.
